summary: Completed testing of PlayXBets P0 bug fix for odds merge/swap issue. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified working correctly with odds displayed properly for matches. The fix for detecting reversed team order between Odds API and CricketData API is working - odds are correctly aligned with home/away teams.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Odds merge/swap issue is resolved. Key findings: (1) 8 matches have odds from Odds API, (2) Odds are correctly aligned with home/away teams (no swapping), (3) Lay odds are correctly calculated as back + 0.02, (4) No exact duplicate matches found (same teams on same date), (5) Admin cron endpoint works for manual odds refresh, (6) Team name matching handles Bangalore/Bengaluru and Rawalpindi variations.

matches_endpoint_returns_odds.details: 8 matches have odds data from Odds API

odds_consistency_home_away.details: home_odds matches odds.home, away_odds matches odds.away

match_detail_returns_odds.details: Match detail endpoint returns correct odds

no_duplicate_matches.details: No exact duplicates (same teams, same date)

admin_login.details: Admin login works with username=admin, password=123456

admin_cron_run.details: Cron endpoint triggers odds refresh, fetched 8 matches

user_login.details: User login works with username=user, password=123456

frontend_homepage_loads.details: Homepage loads with 34 matches, filter tabs working

frontend_match_page_odds.details: Match page shows correct Back/Lay odds (e.g., Gujarat Titans: Back 2.05, Lay 2.07)

odds_not_swapped.details: Odds correctly aligned with home/away teams - Peshawar Zalmi (home) has higher odds (3.65) than Rawalpindiz (away) at 1.27

lay_higher_than_back.details: All lay odds are >= back odds (correct spread)

team_name_matching.details: Fuzzy matching handles Bangalore/Bengaluru, Rawalpindi/Rawalpindiz variations

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Odds from The Odds API were being mismatched/swapped when merged with CricketData API matches
fix_components: Detecting when DB matches have teams in reversed order vs Odds API events and swapping odds accordingly
Improved fuzzy team name matching (handles Bangalore/Bengaluru, Rawalpindi variations)
Post-merge cleanup of Odds-API-created duplicate entries
p0_bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All fix components verified working correctly
evidence: Peshawar Zalmi vs Rawalpindiz: home_odds=3.65, away_odds=1.27 - correctly aligned
Gujarat Titans vs Punjab Kings: home_odds=2.05, away_odds=1.76 - correctly aligned
No duplicate matches found for same team pair on same date
Royal Challengers Bengaluru matches found (Bangalore/Bengaluru matching works)
Rawalpindiz matches found (Rawalpindi variation matching works)
